name: Hexham
operational_notes: AGL is CIS T4 counterparty (won 600 MW wind portion Oct 2025); Wind Prospect is the originator/developer partner. **AGL publicly stated Oct 2025: 'won't reach FID until 2028'** — 3 years post-award. No Vic planning approval yet — key gating milestone. Largest single-tech T4 award. Featured in Bowen 24/6/26 rebid-framing but AGL is HOLDING, not withdrawing. Slow-mover archetype for the T4 wind cohort. AURES prior record showed Wind Prospect only as developer — AGL added 2026-07-16 to reflect CIS counterparty.

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: AGL publicly stated Oct 2025: 'won't reach FID until 2028' — 3 years post-award, exceeding typical CISA execution windows. No Vic planning approval yet — key gating milestone. Referenced in Bowen 24/6/26 rebid-pathway framing but AGL is HOLDING (not withdrawing). Wind Prospect WA is developer partner; AGL is CIS counterparty and ultimate offtaker.
